settings.data.info.description: All your library entries and settings are stored locally in your browser. Use these tools to backup your data or move it to another device.
settings.import.title: Import Data
settings.import.description: Choose how you want to import your data. Merge will keep your existing entries and add new ones. Overwrite will replace everything.
settings.import.confirmOverwriteDescript: This will permanently delete all your current library entries and settings. A safety backup will be downloaded automatically.
settings.delete.title: Delete all data?
settings.delete.description: This permanently deletes your library and resets local settings. This action cannot be undone.
